Cryptographic Algorithm"}], "description": "### Impact

The password reset tokenand API key generation uses a weak cryptographical hash algorithm.

### Patches

Fixed in 2.6.23 and 3.0.6 version.

### Workarounds

Patch the related `User.php` and `ResettingController.php` file in the SecurityBundle.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00193, "percentile": 0.09107}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7fv8-6pp7-6h85", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T17:27:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7fv8-6pp7-6h85", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7fv8-6pp7-6h85"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45701"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-01T17:17:11Z", "published_at": "2026-05-18T17:27:22Z", "references": ["https://github.com/sulu/sulu/security/advisories/GHSA-7fv8-6pp7-6h85", "https://github.com/sulu/sulu/releases/tag/2.6.23", "https://github.com/sulu/sulu/releases/tag/3.0.6", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45701", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7fv8-6pp7-6h85"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/sulu/sulu/security-advisories/GHSA-7fv8-6pp7-6h85", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/sulu/sulu", "summary": "Sulu: Weak Cryptographical usage for API Key generation and Reset Tokens", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T10:51:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7fv8-6pp7-6h85", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.0.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "sulu/sulu"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.0.0-alpha1, <= 3.0.5"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.6.23", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "sulu/sulu"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.6.22"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Sulu: Weak Cryptographical usage for API Key generation and Reset Tokens
